About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an extreme divergence in momentum signals. CLMT ranks #1 with a balanced 93.7 score, showing steady multi-year gains (886.78% over 10 years) and outperforming SPY by 120.19% over the past year, with all moving averages in bullish alignment. In stark contrast, AXTI displays explosive but highly volatile returns, with a staggering 7,107.24% 1-year return yet a concerning 0.14 ratio for 5y/1y returns, suggesting a dramatic spike that may not be sustainable or representative of long-term secular strength. AXTI's extreme outperformance versus SPY (7,078.68%) appears anomalous compared to its 5-year and 10-year patterns, indicating this ticker may be experiencing a temporary surge rather than demonstrating the consistent long-term momentum the dashboard typically identifies. CLMT's correlation profile shows modest positive ties to energy (XLE, 0.237) and commodities (DBA, 0.18) while negatively correlated to tech (QQQ, -0.168), suggesting more defensive secular exposure.
